label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 20

extraction.one_line_summary: POELS Wout attacked with 300m to go on the uphill finish, holding off EVENEPOEL Remco's late charge after 80km breakaway.
tactical_patterns: 32-rider breakaway granted 10min on penultimate stage reveals teams conceding GC while protecting individual jersey holders like AYUSO.
EVENEPOEL attacking 70km from finish in break-from-break fractured cohesive group, forcing AYUSO defensive with Knox/Bagioli/Mollema support.
POELS launched inside 300m on uphill finish, exploiting EVENEPOEL's excessive aerodynamic positioning on final rise after 80km effort.
Jumbo-Visma prioritized AYUSO youth jersey over stage hunting, finally deploying team protection after earlier passive breakaway tactics.

rider_signals.POELS Wout: positive: timed 300m uphill attack perfectly after 80km breakaway, showing superior finish positioning over faster closers
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: lost winnable stage despite being strongest in break, failed tactical execution on final 300m uphill sprint
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: first time Jumbo deployed full team protection for his youth jersey, indicating organizational shift mid-race
rider_signals.VAN EETVELT Lennert: positive: bridged to decisive late break move with SOLER, showing acceleration capacity after 70km breakaway racing
rider_signals.SÁNCHEZ Pelayo: positive: third place finish from quintet reveals BH ability to infiltrate quality breaks with protected riders
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: Jumbo allowed 10min gap with GC secured, flanked by ROGLIČ/VINGEGAARD indicating total control without effort
